pages.text: &6Diggers&r are your earthmovers: hand a citizen a digging tool and they will clear dirt, sand, and gravel to flatten and reshape the land. Digging is the first labor that changes the terrain rather than just living on it.

The &6Quarry&r research takes diggers deeper, cutting stone and coal from the living rock. Extensive Quarries lets crews carry their orders onto unclaimed ground near your borders, biting deeper than a claim alone allows.
Quarried stone and coal feed the kiln, the bloomery, and your building projects. Diggers turn raw landscape into the materials a settlement is built from.
